title: バクシン的トレーニング……？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day while training for speed, our hearts set
on gaining a major win against Nishino Flower...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I've finished my bench presses!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I don't need a break! I still have a lot in me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What exercise should I do next...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hm! I sense some eyes upon us!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hoo! You scared me there!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter you two? You're staring pretty
hard at me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Although I do understand not wanting to take
your eyes off an exceptionally hard worker like
myself!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Gah! Are you perhaps researching me as your
rival?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, I was just thinking that... you're really giving
it your all, Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! You have come to compliment me then, as I
thought. Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If speed's what you have in mind, training like this
is only natural.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Intensive training course spotted, effective for
rapid muscle growth...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Conclusive evidence that hard work and training
is the fastest possible route to becoming the
Sprint Champion.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: The Sprint Champion?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: No, you've got the wron—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You've done so well in your sprints... It's truly
amazing.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, Bourbon and I will be cheering you on, so...
Do your best!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Fear not! I completely understand what you're
doing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All of this is to push my speed to the limits and
help me claim victory everywhere I go on my
Bakushin Road.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Right?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's right! So, yes, I'm okay...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm not worried that you're making me into a
sprinter or anything, so rest easy!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Nor am I thinking about how Rice hasn't been in
any of my races lately!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yup! Let's get back to training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is all so we can win, and that is the one thing
we firmly agree on.
